headings.text: Everything the desk reads, in one surface.

sections.text: CAPABILITIES Everything the desk reads, in one surface. Each panel is engineered for the one thing a trader needs from it — and nothing that gets in the way. The order book, alive Live bids and asks with cumulative depth, bid/ask imbalance, and the spread in basis points — the resting liquidity, not a summary of it. Every print Time & sales streaming trade-by-trade, each tagged by aggressor side, with size bars that surface the blocks. One tape, every market Crypto, precious metals, energy, and equity-index perpetuals in a single watchlist — switch in one keystroke. Candles & volume Six timeframes, a crosshair that reads OHLC anywhere, and a live last-print line — rendered on canvas for a steady frame. Built for the glance Tabular numerals that never jiggle, instant tick flashes, and a layout that holds its hierarchy under pressure. Density without noise. Honest by design Real data only. When the stream drops, the screen freezes the last true value and flags it stale — it never invents
